text: What internal and external data sources are available for this AI system?
aiAgentGuidance: Inventory data sources from system requirements and integration points.

text: What is the current state of data availability for each required source?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess availability status of each identified data source.

text: What data formats are involved (structured, semi-structured, unstructured)?
aiAgentGuidance: Classify data formats from source system metadata.

text: What is the total data volume and expected growth rate?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate data volumes from source system metrics and growth trends.

text: What data freshness requirements exist (real-time, near-real-time, batch)?
aiAgentGuidance: Determine freshness needs from use case response time requirements.

text: What external data sources or enrichment services are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify external data needs from feature requirements and data gaps.

text: What data access permissions and data sharing agreements are in place?
aiAgentGuidance: Map data access requirements to governance processes.

text: Are there any data sharing agreements or restrictions that affect availability?
aiAgentGuidance: Review data sharing agreements for restrictions on AI usage.

text: What is the overall data quality score, including completeness and consistency metrics?
aiAgentGuidance: Run data quality assessment on identified data sources.

text: What data cleaning and preprocessing is required?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify data quality issues and propose cleaning pipeline.

text: What percentage of data records have missing or incomplete fields?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate completeness metrics from data profiling.

text: What data validation rules and quality gates will be implemented?
aiAgentGuidance: Design data validation pipeline based on quality requirements.

text: How will data quality be monitored on an ongoing basis?
aiAgentGuidance: Set up continuous data quality monitoring with alerting.

text: What is the labeling quality for supervised learning tasks?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess label quality metrics (inter-annotator agreement, error rates).

text: How will data inconsistencies across sources be resolved?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose data reconciliation strategy for cross-source conflicts.

text: What outlier detection and handling strategy will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend outlier detection methods based on data characteristics.

text: What ETL/ELT pipeline architecture is needed for AI data preparation?
aiAgentGuidance: Design data pipeline architecture based on volume, variety, and velocity.

text: What data transformation and feature engineering steps are required?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose feature engineering based on model type and data characteristics.

text: What data orchestration tool will manage pipeline execution (Airflow, Dagster, Prefect)?
aiAgentGuidance: Compare orchestration tools against existing stack and requirements.

text: How will data lineage be tracked from source to AI model?
aiAgentGuidance: Design data lineage tracking system for traceability and compliance.

text: What data versioning strategy will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend data versioning approach (DVC, Delta Lake, time-travel).

text: How will feature store capabilities be implemented?
aiAgentGuidance: Evaluate feature store options and design feature management approach.

text: What data catalog or metadata management system is needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend metadata management based on data complexity and team size.

text: How will pipeline reliability and idempotency be ensured?
aiAgentGuidance: Design reliable pipeline with error handling and reprocessing capabilities.

text: What is the data volume and what sampling strategies are used for training?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate training data needs from model type and task complexity.

text: How will training data be sampled and stratified?
aiAgentGuidance: Design sampling strategy to ensure representative training sets.

text: What data augmentation techniques will improve training data diversity?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend augmentation techniques based on data type and gaps.

text: How will training/validation/test splits be managed?
aiAgentGuidance: Design split strategy preventing data leakage.

text: What synthetic data generation is needed to supplement real data?
aiAgentGuidance: Evaluate synthetic data needs and generation approaches.

text: How will training data bias be measured and addressed?
aiAgentGuidance: Design bias measurement framework for training data demographics.

text: What annotation/labeling workflow and tools will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend labeling tools and workflow based on task type and volume.

text: How will human annotator quality be ensured?
aiAgentGuidance: Design QA process with inter-annotator agreement and review sampling.

text: What data classification levels apply (public, internal, confidential, restricted)?
aiAgentGuidance: Classify data based on sensitivity and regulatory requirements.

text: What encryption requirements apply to data at rest and in transit?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply encryption standards based on data classification.

text: How will PII be detected and handled in training and inference data?
aiAgentGuidance: Design PII detection and handling pipeline.

text: What data masking or anonymization is needed for development and testing?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose data masking strategy for non-production environments.

text: What access controls govern who can view, modify, and use training data?
aiAgentGuidance: Design RBAC for data access based on roles and sensitivity.

text: How will data sovereignty requirements be met for different jurisdictions?
aiAgentGuidance: Map data residency requirements to infrastructure deployment.

text: What data breach response plan exists for AI training data?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft incident response plan for data breaches involving AI data.

text: How will model memorization of sensitive data be prevented?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose differential privacy and memorization prevention techniques.

text: What documents and knowledge sources will be indexed for RAG?
aiAgentGuidance: Inventory knowledge sources and prioritize for indexing.

text: What data ingestion pipeline and format support capabilities exist?
aiAgentGuidance: Design document processing pipeline (parsing, cleaning, chunking).

text: What document formats need to be supported (PDF, DOCX, HTML, Markdown)?
aiAgentGuidance: Catalog required formats and identify parsing tools.

text: How will knowledge base freshness and accuracy be maintained?
aiAgentGuidance: Design refresh strategy based on source update frequencies.

text: What metadata will be captured for each document/chunk?
aiAgentGuidance: Define metadata schema for retrieval filtering and attribution.

text: How will document access permissions be reflected in RAG retrieval?
aiAgentGuidance: Design permission-aware retrieval based on user roles.

text: What is the expected knowledge base size and growth trajectory?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate from document inventory and organizational content growth.

text: How will duplicate or conflicting content be handled?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose deduplication and conflict resolution strategies.

text: What data governance framework applies to AI data usage?
aiAgentGuidance: Map AI data usage to organization's data governance framework.

text: Who are the data owners and stewards for each data source?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify data owners from organizational data governance structure.

text: What data usage policies govern AI training and inference?
aiAgentGuidance: Review data usage policies for AI-specific restrictions and permissions.

text: How will data consent management be implemented?
aiAgentGuidance: Design consent tracking for data used in AI processing.

text: What data retention and deletion policies apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply data retention requirements from regulations and policies.

text: How will data quality SLAs be defined and monitored?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose data quality SLAs based on AI model sensitivity to data issues.

text: What data sharing agreements are needed between departments or organizations?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify data sharing needs and draft agreement requirements.

text: How will data provenance be tracked for regulatory compliance?
aiAgentGuidance: Design provenance tracking from data source to model output.

text: What data storage architecture is needed (data lake, data warehouse, lakehouse)?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend storage architecture based on data characteristics and access patterns.

text: What compute infrastructure is needed for data processing?
aiAgentGuidance: Size compute requirements from data volume and processing complexity.

text: What data streaming capabilities are required?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess streaming needs from real-time data requirements.

text: How will data infrastructure scale with growing data volumes?
aiAgentGuidance: Design auto-scaling data infrastructure.

text: What disaster recovery strategy applies to data infrastructure?
aiAgentGuidance: Design DR strategy based on RPO/RTO requirements.

text: How will data pipeline health be monitored?
aiAgentGuidance: Design pipeline monitoring with freshness, completeness, and error tracking.

text: What data drift detection mechanisms will be implemented?
aiAgentGuidance: Set up statistical drift detection on key features.

text: How will data quality anomalies be detected and alerted?
aiAgentGuidance: Implement automated data quality anomaly detection.

text: What data observability tools will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Compare data observability platforms against requirements.

text: How will data SLA compliance be tracked and reported?
aiAgentGuidance: Design SLA tracking dashboard for data metrics.

text: What incident response process exists for data quality issues?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft data incident response playbook.

text: How will data cost optimization be tracked?
aiAgentGuidance: Set up cost monitoring for data storage and processing.

text: What reporting cadence will track data readiness progress?
aiAgentGuidance: Define reporting schedule and dashboard for data readiness metrics.
